sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Dahna tawlna tawh Jesuh ka zuat leh,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak, Ka mawh hong
lakkhiatsak;
Tu’n hong itna’n hong kipaksak taveh,
Ka mawh hong
lakkhiatsak.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak, Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak,
Ni simin la
hong sasa sak; Nuam lua ing,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak, Ka mawh hong
lakkhiatsak.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna vangik ka puakzawh ding hilo,
A vekpin hong laksak, A vekpin hong
laksak;
Ka gimna teng Ama tung ka suanzo,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong
kimawhsak nang khat zong om nawnlo,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak. Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak;
Kha muanna
cing Kei tungah hong piazo;
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tuni Jesuh Khazih kiang na zuat
leh,
Na mawh hong lakhia ding, Na mawh hong lakhia ding;
A itna sung nisim nuamsa ni teh,
Na
mawh hong lakhia ding.
